ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the city within the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "attractions" TEXT /* Notable attractions in the city */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the main image of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the city belongs to */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the official city tourism website */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the city */,
  "is_popular" INTEGER /* Indicates if the city is popular or featured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "calling_code" TEXT /* Calling code of the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary time zone of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the flag image of the country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the country */,
  "is_popular" INTEGER /* Indicates if the country is popular or featured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attractions" (
  "attraction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attraction */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city the attraction is located in */,
  "attraction_name" TEXT /* Name of the attraction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attraction */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the attraction within the city */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the main image of the attraction */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the attraction */,
  "visit_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the attraction has been visited or viewed */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the attraction */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the attraction */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the attraction */,
  "entry_fee" REAL /* Entry fee for the attraction */,
  "is_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attraction is free to visit */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the attraction */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the attraction */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the official website of the attraction */,
  "is_popular" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attraction is popular or featured */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attraction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attractions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
